<!-- Thanks for contributing to OpenDraft! Keep PRs small and focused. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link the issue or DESIGN decision (AD-n) it addresses. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run check` passes (Biome lint + format)
- [ ] `pnpm -r typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm -r test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs (`CONVENTIONS.md` / `docs/DESIGN.md` `AD-n`) if a documented decision or pattern changed
- [ ] No secrets, account IDs, domains, or personal deployment config in the diff

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that needs extra attention, screenshots for UI changes, trade-offs made, etc. -->
